title: Exporting filtered table
excerpt:
Hi all, 
Would it be possible to download the filtered table, or filtered dashboard? 
Currently I haven’t been able to export my filtered tables in a dashboard and really need this feature :slight_smile: 
Thank you! 
Ahr…

posts.author: Rran (Ahran Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Would it be possible to download the filtered table, or filtered dashboard?
Currently I haven’t been able to export my filtered tables in a dashboard and really need this feature

Thank you!
Ahran

posts.author: Alex_AW (Alex A. Wood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Rran. Yes, it is possible to export filtered tables to excel.
If you have included a dashboard as a view within a board and you try to download it to Excel, it will download the entire main table of the board.
You would have to download each dashboard widget because there is currently no way to download everything (except some widgets that are not exportable: battery, text, numbers, workload, etc.)

Screenshot 2022-02-24 at 12.46.232133×1097 132 KB

posts.author: Rran (Ahran Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I tried to download the table widget on a dashboard, but the result was quite different from my filtered widget table.
I had requested to the customer service but the following is the answer from the team.

posts.author: AlinaNZ (Alina Panchenko)
posts.cookedHtml: We need this as well. There is no other way to download filtered view…

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml: I see now that it’s possible to export the filtered table.

posts.author: kmiddlebrooks (Kaitlyn)
posts.cookedHtml: I have different views of my boards grouped by status columns. It will not export to excel the way I have it grouped, filtered, and sorted. It still defaults to the main table.

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same @kmiddlebrooks . I was very excited to have the Group By feature released, and have shifted our standard corporate board design accordingly - less Groups, more Group By. Only to realize recently that not only does the export not include any sorting (which is stated as a disclaimer on the export window), but also does not represent the Group By in the exported Excel.

It would be very helpful to have the views export reflecting Group By. When we want the full table exporting from the Main Table works.
